# CreateDelCraft-HiroTeam [API 4] ### About ![CreateDelCraft (1)](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/76572999/148062252-5e79d0ae-e910-4e19-88bd-3c2d6f857ad2.png) [ENG] This is a [PocketMine-MP](https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP) (or forks) plugin allows you to delete default crafts and create new crafts ! :grin:

[FRA] C'est un [PocketMine-MP](https://github.com/pmmp/PocketMine-MP) plugin qui vous permet de supprimer des crafts par defaut et de créer de nouveaux crafts ! :grin:
- **New craft**

- **Delete craft**
--- ### How to use [ENG] Configure in config.yml + explanation directly in
[FRA] Configurer dans le config.yml + explication directement dedans
